summary: The diff implements the vast majority of requirements across REQ-1 through REQ-5. Backend defines SubscriptionTier variants, user profiles include subscriptionTier, new users default to #starter, query and update functions are exposed. Frontend adds /plans route, PlansPage with tier cards, Navigation Plans link, SubscriptionBadge, FeatureLock component, ProductCard Hot Auction badge, and feature gating on BrowsePage and AddProductPage. A few specific gated features (custom profile banner, featured homepage placement, advanced analytics dashboard) are not evidenced in the diff, and the tier badge is shown in Navigation rather than a dedicated seller profile area.

missing_requirements.requirement: Custom profile banner (Pro+) must be shown with a locked indicator for lower-tier users
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows FeatureLock usage for advanced filters, product analytics, bulk upload, AI price suggestion, and custom shop page, but no evidence of a locked custom profile banner UI element.

missing_requirements.requirement: Featured homepage placement (Max) must be shown with a locked indicator for lower-tier users
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in BrowsePage or any other page of a FeatureLock wrapping a featured homepage placement feature for Max tier.

missing_requirements.requirement: Advanced analytics dashboard (Max) must be shown with a locked indicator for lower-tier users
missing_requirements.reason: No dedicated analytics dashboard page or section with a FeatureLock for Max tier is evidenced in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Subscription tier badge should be displayed on the authenticated user's seller profile area, not only in the navigation bar
missing_requirements.reason: The SubscriptionBadge is rendered in Navigation.tsx for the logged-in user, but the AC specifies the badge should appear in authenticated users profile areas. No dedicated profile page or seller profile view showing the badge is evidenced.

hallucinated_features.description: backend/migration.mo module providing a formal data migration path from an old actor state shape to the new one
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a migration module or any requirement to migrate existing data structures. This is an additional file not requested.
